summary: A beloved show from the run captured with solid audio (minor glitch fixed) and a highlight performance of “High Time”.
review: Fans consistently praise this recording as one of their favorite shows from the three‑night Nassau run, noting the overall great vibe and enjoyable set. The audio is generally clean – a small glitch was corrected by a user – and no major sound issues are reported. “High Time” receives particular shout‑outs, while track labeling errors are the only noted drawback.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive feedback on both performance and audio quality; minor technical note (glitch) and labeling issue keep confidence at medium with only four reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall clean sound; a small glitch was fixed by the uploader. No major mix or clarity complaints, though one reviewer notes incorrect track labeling.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; reviewers simply describe the show as a favorite and enjoyable overall.
